title: The Backrooms: Liminal Depths
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c589dca63ecb469a156745fbc405edbe89092e3a.png)

### An optimized and stylized Minecraft horror modpack based on 'The Backrooms,' featuring eerie environments, atmospheric elements, and enhanced performance for an immersive gameplay experience.

---

The **Minecraft Backrooms Found Footage** mod adds four commands:

- /skinwalker <target>: Just in case the skinwalker refuses to spawn naturally, you can do this to have the skinwalker take the skin of your target
- /release <target>: Releases the target from the skinwalker if the target has had their skin stolen
- /backroomsevent <event>: Manually triggers an event
- /gimmemyinventoryback <target>: Restores the saved inventory of the specified targets from before they entered the Backrooms

### Notes

- The skinwalker does not spawn naturally in singleplayer
- There are a few bugs with devices that use integrated graphics
